smapsActiveEntity.msgText: 111833Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 415/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 402/26 AND THIS MSG, OPERATIONS COMPLETED.

111500Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 414/26. GULF OF ALASKA. ALASKA. 1. UNDERWATER OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 19 JUN BY CABLESHIP CABLE INNOVATOR IN VICINITY 56-18.37N 158-23.24W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 200001Z JUN 26.

101537Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 410/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING: A. 141400Z TO 141824Z JUN, ALTERNATE 1400Z TO 1824Z DAILY 15 THRU 20 JUN IN AREA BOUND BY 31-44.00N 121-09.00W, 31-43.00N 121-16.00W, 34-41.00N 120-42.00W, 34-38.00N 120-28.00W. B. 141400Z TO 141843Z JUN, ALTERNATE 1400Z TO 1843Z DAILY 15 THRU 20 JUN IN AREA BOUND BY 28-16.00N 121-48.00W, 28-34.00N 122-21.00W, 29-50.00N 121-45.00W, 29-48.00N 121-35.00W, 28-39.00N 121-25.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 201943Z JUN 26.

101527Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 409/26. NORTH PACIFIC. JOHNSTON ATOLL. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, SPACE DEBRIS 2000Z TO 2100Z DAILY 15 THRU 21 JUN IN AREA BOUND BY 27-28.71N 171-24.34W, 13-38.98N 174-00.45W, 01-35.98N 175-48.45W, 00-54.72N 172-43.89W, 12-22.59N 170-40.14W, 16-45.76N 170-06.75W, 26-43.75N 168-39.09W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 212200Z JUN 26.

072321Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 407/26 BERING SEA. ALASKA. 1. CABLE OPERATIONS 11 THRU 30 JUN BY CABLESHIP IT INTEGRITY ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 64-29.00N 165-19.20W, 62-54.20N 165-49.30W, 62-15.60N 166-58.30W, 61-24.90N 167-09.00W, 60-38.00N 165-50.90W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010001Z JUL 26.
060301Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 404/26. NORTH PACIFIC. HAWAII. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 081900Z TO 130300Z JUN IN AREA WITHIN TWO MILES OF 21-17.48N 157-59.23W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 130400Z JUN 26.

051522Z JUN 26. NAVAREA XII 403/26. 1. NAVAREA XII WARNINGS IN FORCE AS OF 051522Z JUN. ALL THE INFORCE WARNINGS ARE LISTED HERE. 402/2026, 401/2026, 397/2026, 396/2026, 395/2026, 394/2026, 393/2026, 388/2026, 387/2026, 383/2026, 379/2026, 378/2026, 377/2026, 376/2026, 375/2026, 363/2026, 287/2026, 276/2026, 125/2026, 98/2026. 718/2025, 678/2025, 422/2025, 392/2025, 354/2025, 344/2025, 338/2025, 259/2025, 208/2025. 862/2024, 441/2024. 93/2023. 721/2022, 720/2022, 244/2022, 243/2022. 2. THE COMPLETE TEXT OF ALL IN-FORCE NAVAREA XII BROADCAST WARNINGS ARE AVAILABLE ON THE NGA MARITIME SAFETY INFORMATION WEBSITE AT: MSI.NGA.MIL/NAVWARNINGS. ALTERNATIVELY, THESE MAY BE REQUESTED BY E-MAIL FROM THE NAVAREA XII COORDINATOR AT NAVSAFETY@NGA.MIL. 3. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 400/2026, 389/2026, 355/2026.

042013Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 401/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 1430Z TO 2100Z DAILY 09 THRU 11 JUN IN AREA BOUND BY 33-34.71N 119-10.99W, 33-11.57N 119-06.83W, 32-39.80N 119-44.98W, 32-44.26N 122-01.26W, 33-51.79N 123-59.70W, 34-32.08N 122-49.71W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 112200Z JUN 26.
130003Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 397/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 081430Z TO 120200Z JUN IN AREA WITHIN ONE MILE OF 32-32.97N 117-10.93W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 120300Z JUN 26.
122357Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 396/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 081430Z TO 120200Z JUN IN AREA WITHIN TWO MILES OF 32-32.97N 117-12.87W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 120300Z JUN 26.
130027Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 395/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 081600Z TO 112355Z JUN IN AREA WITHIN ONE MILE OF 32-35.82N 117-10.87W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 120055Z JUN 26.
030435Z JUN 26 NAVAREA XII 394/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 081430Z TO 120200Z JUN IN AREA WITHIN TWO MILES OF 32-32.97N 117-14.70W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 120300Z JUN 26.

261607Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 379/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 010800Z JUN TO 010800Z JUL IN AREA BOUND BY 32-55.00N 118-25.00W, 32-55.00N 118-15.00W, 32-40.00N 118-15.00W, 32-40.00N 118-35.00W, 32-45.00N 118-35.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010900Z JUL 26.

261604Z MAY 26 NAVAREA XII 378/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 010800Z JUN TO 010800Z JUL IN AREA BOUND BY 32-33.00N 118-25.00W, 32-35.00N 118-16.00W, 32-35.00N 117-40.00W, 31-55.00N 117-40.00W, 31-55.00N 118-25.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010900Z JUL 26.
231812Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 287/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 270/26 AND THIS MSG, OPERATIONS COMPLETED.

190624Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 276/26. NORTH PACIFIC. HAWAII. 1. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY HONOLULU 21-22.00N 158-09.00W TRANSMIT SERVICES UNRELIABLE. 2. HONOLULU BROADCASTS WILL BE TRANSMITTED FROM USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY GUAM 13-25.00N 144-50.00E. 3. DSC RESPONSES WILL BE TRANSMITTED FROM USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY POINT REYES 37-56.00N 122-44.00W. 4. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 274/26.
171634Z FEB 26 NAVAREA XII 98/26(16). BERING SEA. ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E HF TRANSMIT AND RECEIVE SERVICES INOPERATIVE.
132105Z NOV 25 NAVAREA XII 718/25(16). GULF OF ALASKA. 1. WEATHER FAX SERVICES OFF AIR AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 460/24.
141418Z JUL 25 NAVAREA XII 422/25(16). BERING STRAIT. ALASKA. SCIENTIFIC MOORINGS, AT DEPTH 15 METERS, ESTABLISHED IN: A. 65-46.86N 168-34.07W. B. 65-44.76N 168-15.75W.

242359Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 392/25(16). NORTH PACIFIC. M/V MORNING MIDAS SANK IN 45-16.88N 179-14.13W. VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION AND REPORT PRESENCE OF OIL SHEENS OR DEBRIS TO USCG SECTOR WESTERN ALASKA AND US ARCTIC, PHONE: 907 428 4100, E-MAIL: SOUTHWESTERNAK@USCG.MIL.

130011Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 354/25(GEN). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MESSAGING SERVICES UNRELIABLE AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. PT REYES (C) 37-55.50N 122-43.90W. B. HONOLULU (O) 21-26.00N 158-09.00W. C. KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. D. ASTORIA (W) 46-10.00N 123-49.00W. E. CAMBRIA (Q) 33-44.00N 118-24.00W.
100619Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 344/25(16). BERING SEA. ALASKA. COMMDET KODIAK, AK REMOTE SITE SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E HF R/T SERVICES OFF AIR.
071202Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 338/25(18). OREGON. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY ASTORIA (W) 46-10.00N 123-49.00W OFF AIR.
051901Z MAY 25 NAVAREA XII 259/25(16). GULF OF ALASKA. ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W HF AND DSC SERVICES UNRELIABLE.
061220Z APR 25 NAVAREA XII 208/25(22). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. COLOMBIA. PUNTA SOLDADO LIGHT 03-48.50N 077-10.80W DISCONTINUED.

281257Z OCT 24 NAVAREA XII 862/24(83). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. KIRIBATI. CABLE OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE IN VICINITY OF TRACKLINE JOINING 02-01.46N 157-29.67W, 02-01.45N 157-29.69W, 02-01.45N 157-29.72W, 02-01.42N 157-29.82W, 02-01.36N 157-30.04W, 02-01.22N 157-30.29W, 02-00.20N 157-32.23W. 100 METER BERTH REQUESTED.
182355Z JUN 24 NAVAREA XII 441/24(21). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MEXICO. MORRO SANTO DOMINGO LIGHT 28-14.37N 114-06.18W UNLIT.

282248Z FEB 23 NAVAREA XII 93/23(19). NORTH PACIFIC. HAWAII. 1. INTERMITTENT MISSILE FIRING OPERATIONS CONDUCTED BY THE PACIFIC MISSILE RANGE FACILITY (PMRF), BARKING SANDS, KAUAI, HAWAII, IN WHISKEY 188 (W-188) OPERATING AREA. OPERATIONS ARE CONDUCTED PERIODICALLY THROUGHOUT EACH WEEK IN AREA BOUND BY 22-00.0N 159-51.0W, 22-00.0N 160-00.0W, 22-04.0N 160-06.0W, 21-59.5N 160-21.0W, 22-05.0N 161-35.0W, 22-45.0N 161-25.0W, 22-56.0N 161-49.0W, 23-34.0N 161-18.6W, 23-57.0N 160-41.0W, 25-41.0N 161-36.0W, 26-00.0N 159-58.0W, 25-47.0N 158-15.0W, 23-54.0N 158-15.0W, 22-20.0N 159-09.0W, 22-21.0N 159-30.0W, 22-13.0N 159-42.0W, 22-00.0N 159-51.0W. 2. VESSELS MAY BE REQUESTED TO ALTER COURSE DUE TO FIRING OPERATIONS AND ARE REQUESTED TO CONTACT "PACIFIC MISSILE RANGE BARKING SANDS" ON VHF MARINE BAND CHANNEL 16 PRIOR TO ENTERING THE ABOVE BOUNDARIES. IF UNABLE TO CONTACT PMRF PRIOR TO ENTERING OR WHILE IN THE WARNING AREA, RELAY MESSAGES THROUGH U.S. COAST GUARD HONOLULU. 3. VESSELS INBOUND AND OUTBOUND FOR HAWAIIAN PORTS WILL CREATE THE LEAST INTERFERENCE TO FIRING OPERATIONS AS WELL AS ENHANCE VESSEL SAFETY BY PASSING SOUTH OF THE ISLANDS OF KAUAI AND NIIHAU DURING SPECIFIED TIMES. 4. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 269/21.
272221Z SEP 22 NAVAREA XII 721/22(21). EL SALVADOR. CHART 21524 MOORING BUOYS 13-35.23N 089-51.10W UNLIT.
272211Z SEP 22 NAVAREA XII 720/22(21). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. EL SALVADOR. CHART 12529. PUERTO DE LA UNION 16 BUOY 13-20.36N 087-48.99W UNLIT.
MSGID/GENADMIN/NGA NAVSAFETY WASHINGTON DC// RMKS/ NAVAREA XII 244/22(21). GOLFO DE CALIFORNIA. MEXICO. CHART 21120. BOCA DEL TULE LIGHT 23-14.3N 109-26.4W UNLIT.

MSGID/GENADMIN/NGA NAVSAFETY WASHINGTON DC// RMKS/ NAVAREA XII 243/22(18). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MEXICO. CHART 18740. 1. CORONADO ISLAND SOUTH LIGHT 32-23.5N 117-14.5W UNLIT. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 159/21.
